review_text: Absolutely amazing Samosa (2 pcs)  Gulab Jamun (2 pcs)  Chicken Seekh Kebab  Mango Lassi  and Butter Chicken! The Mango Lassi was cooked to perfection. Fresh ingredients and authentic flavors. Highly recommend!
Exceptional quality! Ordered Malai Kofta  Jeera Rice  Lamb Rogan Josh  Mango Lassi  and Samosa (2 pcs) and everything was delicious. The Mango Lassi melted in my mouth. Perfect!
Absolutely amazing Chicken Biryani! The Chicken Biryani was cooked to perfection. Fresh ingredients and authentic flavors. Highly recommend!
Hands down the best Tandoori Roti I've ever had! Tandoori Roti were all prepared beautifully. Fresh and flavorful!
Pleasant meal! Gulab Jamun (2 pcs)  Fresh Lime Soda  and Chicken Tikka Masala arrived warm. Gulab Jamun (2 pcs) was tasty though not exceptional. Would order again.
Very satisfied! Palak Paneer were fresh and flavorful. Palak Paneer was the standout dish.
Expected better. Masala Chai and Chicken Tikka Masala were subpar. Chicken Tikka Masala was too oily and greasy. Stomach upset followed.
Not bad  not great. Samosa (2 pcs)  Chicken Seekh Kebab  Sweet Lassi  and Chicken Biryani were edible. Samosa (2 pcs) needed more seasoning.
Exceptional quality! Ordered Samosa (2 pcs)  Paneer Butter Masala  and Gulab Jamun (2 pcs) and everything was delicious. The Gulab Jamun (2 pcs) melted in my mouth. Perfect!
Outstanding experience! The Butter Naan  Chicken Biryani  and Malai Kofta exceeded all expectations. Butter Naan was the star of the meal. Will definitely order again!
Solid experience. Vegetable Biryani  Chicken 65  Rasmalai (2 pcs)  Butter Naan  and Chole Bhature were well-prepared. Butter Naan had great flavor. Minor issues with packaging.
Perfect in every way! Gulab Jamun (2 pcs)  Chicken Biryani  Garlic Naan  Palak Paneer  and Dal Makhani were all excellent. Garlic Naan stood out with its rich  authentic taste.
